meta.title: Devya X-Ray — Engineering Review
meta.description: Devya X-Ray audits your codebase, infrastructure, and delivery practices, then hands you a prioritized, evidence-backed engineering report.

landing.tagline: They interview you. We read your code.
landing.pitch: Devya X-Ray is a deep engineering review: we audit your codebase, infrastructure, and delivery practices against a proven maturity framework, then verify every claim against your actual code. You get a prioritized, evidence-backed report and a 90-day plan — the whole engagement runs in two weeks.
landing.ctaMicro: Free self-serve snapshot — see where you stand in ~15 minutes. Full review delivered in 2 weeks.
landing.proofHeadline: Devya was assessed under an international engineering accelerator and scored 87% — we built X-Ray from the inside.
landing.proofEvidenceBody: Every score is quoted to a file and a line, never a gut feel.
landing.proofTurnaroundBody: Self-assessment, code review, workshop, and report — start to finish in two weeks.
landing.proofFrameworkBody: A maturity framework covering the full engineering surface, not a checklist.
landing.diffLede: Most reviews stop at what your team says. We measure what your code actually does — and the gap between the two is the headline of your report.
landing.diffGapNote: This delta is exactly where risk hides — and where the fastest wins live.
landing.pillarsLede: One coherent framework across delivery, product, quality, architecture, code, security, and AI.
landing.pillar1Desc: Flow, cadence, and how reliably work ships to production.
landing.pillar2Desc: How clearly intent becomes buildable, testable scope.
landing.pillar3Desc: Testing depth, automation, and defect prevention.
landing.pillar4Desc: Boundaries, coupling, and how the system scales with the team.
landing.pillar5Desc: Readability, debt, and the cost of changing the codebase.
landing.pillar6Desc: Threat surface, resilience, and how gracefully things fail.
landing.pillar7Desc: How well the team builds with and around modern AI.
landing.howLede: A tight, structured engagement — no open-ended discovery, no drawn-out audit.
landing.howWeek1Body: Your team scores itself across the seven pillars while we read the codebase and infrastructure firsthand.
landing.howWeek2Body: We reconcile claims against evidence in a working session, finalize the scores, and deliver the report with a 90-day plan.
landing.getTitle: A report you can act on Monday
landing.getReportDesc: A living, drill-down report scored across all seven pillars.
landing.getPdfDesc: The same report, print-perfect, ready to forward to leadership.
landing.getRoadmapDesc: Prioritized fixes sequenced into 30- and 90-day buckets.
landing.getQuickWinsDesc: High-impact, low-effort changes you can ship this sprint.
landing.pricingTitle: Start free, go deep when you're ready
landing.pricingLede: See where you stand in minutes, then let us verify it against your real code.
landing.pricingTier2Tagline: The 2-week engagement — your self-score, verified against your actual code.
landing.pricingRatesNote: Fixed price in EGP. Other currencies are indicative, at today's rate.
landing.pricingTier3Tagline: We don't just find the gaps — we close them.
landing.pricingTier3F2: Devya implements the top roadmap items
landing.pricingTier3F3: A re-X-Ray to prove the improvement
landing.pricingQuoteNote: Book a call for a quote
landing.faqA1: Two weeks, end to end: self-assessment and code review in week one, validation workshop and delivered report in week two.
landing.faqQ2: Do you need access to our code?
landing.faqA2: For the Full X-Ray, yes — read-only access. We quote every finding to a file and line as evidence, and we never copy or exfiltrate your code.
landing.faqQ3: Is the free snapshot really free?
landing.faqA3: Yes. The Snapshot is a genuinely free, instant self-assessment — no card, no call required. You only pay if you choose the code-verified Full X-Ray.
landing.faqQ4: Which languages do you work in?
landing.faqA4: The whole program — assessment, report, and workshop — is available in English and Arabic.
landing.faqA5: A short scoping conversation: we learn about your stack and team, confirm scope and access, and give you a quote for the Full X-Ray.
landing.finalTitle: See where your engineering really stands.
landing.finalLede: Start with a free snapshot, or book a call to scope the full, code-verified X-Ray.

start.title: Start your free X-Ray snapshot
start.lede: Tell us who you are and jump straight into the self-assessment. Your instant, auto-scored maturity snapshot is waiting on the other side.
start.consent: By continuing you agree to let Devya use these details to prepare your snapshot and follow up about a Full X-Ray.
start.errorEmail: Please enter a valid work email.
start.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.
start.sampleNote: Curious first? See a live sample report.

assessment.errorBody: This link may have expired or the token is invalid. Please contact your Devya consultant for a fresh link.
assessment.welcomeIntro: This self-assessment is the first step of your {framework} review. For each engineering practice, pick the maturity level that honestly matches where you are today and, when you can, point us to evidence.
assessment.expectHonesty: Each maturity level shows a short rubric — use it to answer honestly; there are no wrong answers.
assessment.expectVerify: We verify the answers together in the workshop, so estimates are fine.
assessment.resumeNote: Your progress is saved automatically — you can close this page and come back anytime with the same link.
assessment.resumeProgress: You've already answered {answered} of {total} — pick up where you left off.
assessment.saveError: Couldn't save — we'll retry with your next change
assessment.evidencePlaceholder: Paste a link, name a file or tool, or leave a one-line note on where this lives…
assessment.allAnswered: Every practice is answered — great work.
assessment.submitNote: You won't be able to edit your answers after submitting.
assessment.submitEmpty: Answer at least one practice before submitting.
assessment.confirmBody: After submitting you can no longer edit your answers. We'll verify them together in the workshop.
assessment.submittedBody: Your self-assessment has been submitted. We'll verify the answers together in your workshop and follow up with the full report.

report.errorBody: This link may have expired or the token is invalid. Please contact your Devya consultant.
report.snapshotDisclaimer: These scores come straight from your team's self-assessment. They haven't been checked against your actual code yet.
report.snapshotUpsellTitle: This is what your team says. Now let's verify it.
report.snapshotUpsellBody: Book a Full X-Ray and we'll verify this snapshot against your actual code — file by file, line by line — and hand you a code-verified report with a 90-day plan. In two weeks.
report.guideSubtitle: A quick key to the scores, scales, and decision bands used throughout.
report.guideMaturityBody: Every practice is scored from 1 to 4, from Absent to Established. This is the backbone of every chart and table below.
report.guideHealthBody: A single 0–100 score per pillar: the average maturity of its scored practices, rescaled so level 1 = 0% and level 4 = 100%. Higher is healthier.
report.guideUrgencyBody: A 0–100 score weighing how weak a practice is against how much it matters. It maps to a decision band that tells you how soon to act.
report.guideCalibrationBody: The gap between what your team reported and what we verified in the code. It shows where your team's read of the codebase is accurate — and where it drifts.
report.bandMonitorDesc: Solid — keep an eye on it
report.bandPrioritizeDesc: Weak — put it on the roadmap
report.tipHealth: Average maturity of scored practices (1–4) rescaled to 0–100%. Higher means a healthier pillar.
report.tipUrgency: How urgently this area needs attention (0–100), weighing weakness against business impact. It maps to a decision band.
report.tipEvaluated: Practices we assessed vs the number scored against verified evidence. A wider gap means more of the pillar is still to be verified.
report.tipCalibration: How your team's self-scores compared to our verified scores: ▲ overclaimed, ✓ calibrated, ▼ underclaimed.
report.tipDistribution: How this pillar's scored practices spread across the four maturity levels.
report.tipByLevel: The same scored practices as a single stacked bar, so you can read the balance across levels at a glance.
report.tipClaimVsVerified: Practice by practice: your self score, our verified score, and the gap between them.
report.tipSeverity: How damaging this issue is if left unaddressed: Critical > High > Medium > Low.
report.tipEffort: Rough size of the fix, as a t-shirt size: XS (hours) to XL (weeks).
report.tipTimeline: When we recommend tackling this, relative to the roadmap horizons.
report.tipQuickWins: Each item plotted by business impact (vertical) against effort to ship (horizontal). Top-left = do first.
report.pillarNotScored: This pillar has no verified scores yet, so its health and urgency are not shown. Self-reported answers are still summarized below.
report.radarSubtitle: Verified health per pillar, with your self-reported ring overlaid.
report.maturityHint1: Absent — the practice is not in place.
report.maturityHint2: Misapplied — attempted, but done in a way that undermines its value.
report.maturityHint3: Emerging — present but inconsistent or partial.
report.roadmapSubtitle: Findings sequenced across three horizons, colored by severity.
report.quickWinsSubtitle: Impact vs effort — start top-left and work outward.
